name: WarForwards
short_description: WarForwards is a turn-based strategy war game focused on tactical combat, unit positioning, and methodical decision-making on grid-based battlefields.
detailed_description:
Turn-Based Tactical Warfare

WarForwards is a turn-based strategy game centered on tactical combat and careful planning. Battles take place on grid-based maps where positioning, timing, and unit management determine victory.

The game emphasizes deliberate decision-making over fast reflexes, rewarding players who enjoy thinking several moves ahead.

Tactical Combat and Unit Management

Each encounter challenges players to deploy and maneuver units efficiently while responding to enemy actions. Success depends on understanding unit strengths, terrain advantages, and turn order rather than overwhelming force.

WarForwards is designed for fans of classic tactical war games who prefer structured, rule-driven combat.

A Focused Strategy Experience

The presentation is clean and functional, keeping attention on the battlefield and tactical choices. There are no distractions from progression systems or narrative layers — the focus remains squarely on strategy and combat.

This is a single-player tactical strategy experience aimed at players who value planning, structure, and replayability.

Key Features

  • Turn-based tactical combat

  • Grid-based battlefield design

  • Strategic unit positioning and planning

  • Classic war-game–inspired mechanics

  • Replayable encounters focused on mastery

  • Single-player strategy experience
